input_statement: For testing, the tester:
- signs the crypt with a digital signature (if available)
- fills files into the admin area, in Groups -> (group name) section, putting a new version number.
- marks the uploaded files as Staging
- runs autotests
If the tests are successful, the tester marks the tested set of files as Actual in Groups -> (group name)
C: If the tests are successful, and in Groups -> (group name)

Q: Why prepare both .dll
and .exe?
A:
The crypter uses the one of the files that is more convenient for him.
Usually .dll is more convenient for crypting, but sometimes .exe is more convenient for crypting
C: for convenience

input_statement: Besides, .exe is a control sample - in case something doesn't work, you can run .exe and check the functionality.
C: in case something doesn't work, you can run it and check the functionality
